heading: Edit an Archiving Rule Through the API
body:
To edit an online archive through the API (Application Programming Interface), send a `PATCH` request
to the [onlineArchives](api/doc/atlas-admin-api-v2/group/endpoint-online-archive) endpoint with
the unique ID of the online archive to update. To learn more about the
API (Application Programming Interface) syntax and options, see [API](api/doc/atlas-admin-api-v2/operation/operation-updategroupclusteronlinearchive).
